# Mohawk Medibles

> Indigenous-owned premium cannabis dispensary on Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory, Ontario, Canada.

> For the full product catalog, see: https://mohawkmedibles.ca/llms-full.txt

## About

Mohawk Medibles is an Indigenous-owned cannabis dispensary operating from Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory. We offer premium, lab-tested cannabis products including flower, edibles, concentrates, vapes, pre-rolls, and accessories. Every product meets our Empire Standard™ — a quality benchmark for potency, purity, and ethical sourcing.

## What We Offer

- **Premium Flower**: Hand-selected Indica, Sativa, and Hybrid strains with full terpene profiles
- **Edibles**: Gummies, chocolates, beverages, and baked goods with precise dosing
- **Concentrates**: Hash, shatter, wax, live resin, and distillate
- **Vapes**: Cartridges and disposable pens from trusted brands
- **Pre-Rolls**: Singles, multi-packs, and infused joints
- **Accessories**: Grinders, rolling papers, pipes, and storage

## Key Facts

- **Location**: Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory, Deseronto, Ontario, Canada
- **Founded by**: Indigenous entrepreneurs on sovereign territory
- **Product Count**: 344+ verified SKUs
- **Quality Standard**: Empire Standard™ — lab-tested, terpene-profiled
- **Shipping**: Canada-wide via Canada Post Xpresspost
- **Website**: https://mohawkmedibles.ca

## Expertise & Authority

Our cultivation team has 10+ years of cannabis expertise on Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory. We provide:
- Science-backed product education (terpene profiles, cannabinoid ratios)
- Dosage guidance for new and experienced consumers
- Strain selection consultation
- Community-focused cannabis education

- [The Complete Terpene Guide](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/blog/terpene-guide-cannabis-effects) — How terpenes shape cannabis effects

- [Indica vs Sativa vs Hybrid](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/blog/indica-vs-sativa-vs-hybrid-guide) — What the science actually says in 2026
- [The Ultimate Hash Guide](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/blog/hash-guide-types-potency-canada) — Types, potency, and how to choose
- [CBD Oil Guide](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/blog/cbd-oil-guide-benefits-dosing-canada) — Benefits, dosing charts, and product picks
- [How to Buy Cannabis Online in Canada](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/blog/buying-cannabis-online-canada-guide) — Complete 2026 guide

## Canada-Wide Delivery Coverage

Mohawk Medibles delivers to all 13 provinces and territories across Canada — 72+ cities with tracked Canada Post Xpresspost shipping.

### Delivery Hub
- [All Delivery Locations](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery) — Browse all provinces and cities we ship to

### Provinces & Territories
- [Ontario Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/ontario) — Toronto, Ottawa, Mississauga, Hamilton, London, Brampton, Kitchener, Windsor, Markham, Vaughan, Oakville, Barrie, Guelph, Kingston, St. Catharines, Oshawa, Sudbury, Thunder Bay, Peterborough, Belleville
- [Quebec Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/quebec) — Montreal, Quebec City, Laval, Gatineau, Longueuil, Sherbrooke, Trois-Rivières, Lévis
- [British Columbia Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/british-columbia) — Vancouver, Victoria, Surrey, Burnaby, Kelowna, Kamloops, Nanaimo, Abbotsford, Richmond
- [Alberta Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/alberta) — Calgary, Edmonton, Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie, Airdrie
- [Manitoba Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/manitoba) — Winnipeg, Brandon, Steinbach, Thompson
- [Saskatchewan Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/saskatchewan) — Saskatoon, Regina, Prince Albert, Moose Jaw
- [Nova Scotia Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/nova-scotia) — Halifax, Sydney, Dartmouth
- [New Brunswick Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/new-brunswick) — Moncton, Saint John, Fredericton, Miramichi
- [Newfoundland & Labrador Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/newfoundland-and-labrador) — St. John's, Mount Pearl, Corner Brook
- [Prince Edward Island Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/prince-edward-island) — Charlottetown, Summerside
- [Northwest Territories Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/northwest-territories) — Yellowknife, Hay River
- [Nunavut Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/nunavut) — Iqaluit, Rankin Inlet
- [Yukon Delivery](https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery/yukon) — Whitehorse, Dawson City

### Shipping Details
- **Free shipping** on orders over $150 CAD to any Canadian address
- **Delivery times**: 1-2 days (Ontario), 2-3 days (Quebec, Prairies, Maritimes, BC), 3-7 days (Northern Canada)
- **Tracking**: Full Canada Post tracking on every order
- **Packaging**: Discreet, unmarked boxes with vacuum-sealed products

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Mohawk Medibles?
Mohawk Medibles is an Indigenous-owned cannabis dispensary located on Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory in Ontario, Canada. We specialize in premium, lab-tested cannabis products.

### Do you ship across Canada?
Yes, we ship Canada-wide via Canada Post Xpresspost with tracking on every order.

### What is the Empire Standard™?
The Empire Standard™ is our quality benchmark ensuring every product is lab-tested for potency and purity, with full terpene profile analysis.

### What types of cannabis do you carry?
We carry 344+ products across flower (Indica, Sativa, Hybrid), edibles, concentrates, vapes, pre-rolls, and accessories.

### Are your products lab-tested?
Yes, all products undergo third-party lab testing for potency, pesticides, and contaminants.

### How do I choose the right strain?
Our product pages include detailed terpene profiles, THC/CBD percentages, and effect descriptions. We also provide a strain finder tool and expert consultation.

### Do you deliver to my city?
We deliver to 72+ cities across all 13 provinces and territories in Canada. Visit https://mohawkmedibles.ca/delivery to find your city and see estimated delivery times.

### How long does delivery take?
Ontario: 1-2 business days. Quebec, Prairies, Maritimes, BC: 2-3 business days. Northern Canada: 3-7 business days. All orders ship via Canada Post Xpresspost with full tracking.

### Is shipping free?
Yes, all orders over $150 CAD ship free to any Canadian address. Orders under $150 have a flat-rate shipping fee based on your region.

### Is the packaging discreet?
Yes. All orders ship in plain, unmarked boxes with no cannabis branding. Products are vacuum-sealed for freshness and odour control.

### What payment methods do you accept?
We accept Interac e-Transfer, Visa, Mastercard, and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin). All transactions are processed in Canadian dollars (CAD).

### What is the legal age to order?
The legal age varies by province: 18+ in Alberta and Quebec, 19+ in all other provinces and territories. You must confirm your age at checkout.
